signals.headline: Chris Dudley Announces Second Bid for Oregon Governor on January 26, 2026 | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Chris Dudley Announces Second Bid for Oregon Governor on January 26, 2026 | NO | HIGH confidence**

Chris Dudley, a former NBA player and 2010 Republican nominee who lost narrowly to Democrat John Kitzhaber, officially launched his campaign for Oregon's 2026 gubernatorial race on January 26, 2026, joining a crowded field of 14 Republicans challenging incumbent Democrat Tina Kotek.[1][2][3][4] This
